title: Tripe Teriyaki
description: A Japanese-inspired dish featuring tender tripe cooked in a sweet teriyaki sauce.
instructions: 1. In a large pot, combine tripe and enough cold water to cover it. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to a simmer and cook for 1 hour.
2. Drain the tripe and cut it into bite-sized pieces.
3. In a small saucepan, combine soy sauce, sake, brown sugar, and ginger. Bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. In a large skillet or wok, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat. Add the tripe and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
5. Add the teriyaki sauce to the skillet and stir to coat the tripe.
6. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the tripe is tender.
7. Garnish with green onion and serve over rice.
